summary: Created PetclinicMcpServer (@ApplicationScoped) with three @Tool methods (listPets, getPet, getOwnersPet) injecting PetclinicRestClient via @Inject @RestClient and ObjectMapper via @Inject — no throws on any @Tool method, errors caught and returned as ToolResponse.error. Populated application.properties with port 8888, CORS, and rest-client URL using configKey=petclinic. Added petclinic-mcp sidecar container on port 8888 with QUARKUS_REST_CLIENT_PETCLINIC_URL env var to existing Deployment without touching petclinic container, Service, or Route. Added PetclinicMcpServerTest with three tests: listPets success, getPet success, and getPet error path using @InjectMock @RestClient.
